# Summary

Thank you for contributing to multimark! To make this process easier for
everyone, please explain the context and purpose of your contribution. Also, list
the changes made to the existing code or documentation.

# Related GitHub Issues and PRs

- Ref: #

# Checklist

- [ ] I understand and agree to the [Code of Conduct](https://www.contributor-covenant.org/version/3/0/).
- [ ] I have followed the [Style Guide for Python Code](https://peps.python.org/pep-0008/) as best as possible for the submitted code.
- [ ] I have added **pytest** unit tests for any new functionality.
